articles.title: Bitcoin 'done' with 85% crashes, says Cathie Wood amid new $34K target
articles.summary: ARK Invest CEO Cathie Wood said that Bitcoin as a "proven" asset would no longer experience drawdowns of 85% or more from all-time highs.

articles.summary: A plan to move supervision of major crypto asset service providers to the France-based ESMA is testing MiCA’s balance between EU-level control and national-level decision-making.

articles.title: Solo Bitcoin miner bags $210K Bitcoin block reward

articles.title: Binance led Q1 crypto derivatives as Hyperliquid cracked top 10: CoinGlass
